memory_cards.statement: Graph memory systems enable agents to preserve relationships between entities in a structured, queryable format.
Provenance tracking is essential for graph memory systems to maintain trust and traceability of stored information.
Update semantics must be explicitly defined in graph memory systems to handle modifications, deletions, and versioning of stored data.
